canonical_definition: A multitask, multilingual benchmark suite covering 20 Indonesian languages and 3 register variations across 6 tasks: reading comprehension, open-domain QA, natural language inference, causal reasoning, cultural QA, and machine translation.
papers: V-SEAM: Visual Semantic Editing and Attention Modulating for Causal Interpretability of Vision-Language Models

definitions.text: A multitask, multilingual benchmark suite covering 20 Indonesian languages and 3 register variations across 6 tasks: reading comprehension, open-domain QA, natural language inference, causal reasoning, cultural QA, and machine translation.
definitions.paper: V-SEAM: Visual Semantic Editing and Attention Modulating for Causal Interpretability of Vision-Language Models
